column1: Matt Olson stands out as the top pick, combining a strong track record of hitting in over 84% of games with a favorable platoon advantage and a significant park boost in Colorado. Xavier Edwards offers reliability in the cleanup spot with a solid hit probability and a lefty-righty edge, though his recent form is less convincing. Elly De La Cruz and Ozzie Albies also bring consistency and favorable matchups, but Olson’s blend of power, matchup, and environment makes him the most dependable choice today.
